parameters.query:
INSERT INTO eda_logs (log_id, tool_name, verilog_files, total_lines, error_count, warning_count, timing_violations, chunk_count, status, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Process - Extract Metadata').first().json.log_id }}',
  '{{ $('Process - Extract Metadata').first().json.tool_name }}',
  ARRAY[{{ $('Process - Extract Metadata').first().json.verilog_files.map(f => `'${f}'`).join(',') }}]::TEXT[],
  {{ $('Process - EDA Log Parser').first().json.total_lines }},
  {{ $('Process - EDA Log Parser').first().json.error_count }},
  {{ $('Process - EDA Log Parser').first().json.warning_count }},
  {{ $('Process - EDA Log Parser').first().json.timing_violations }},
  {{ $('Process - EDA Log Parser').first().json.chunks.length }},
  'indexed',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (log_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status = 'indexed',
  chunk_count = EXCLUDED.chunk_count;

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "log_id": "{{ $('Process - Extract Metadata').first().json.log_id }}",
  "chunks_indexed": {{ $('Process - EDA Log Parser').first().json.chunks.length }},
  "error_count": {{ $('Process - EDA Log Parser').first().json.error_count }},
  "warning_count": {{ $('Process - EDA Log Parser').first().json.warning_count }},
  "timing_violations": {{ $('Process - EDA Log Parser').first().json.timing_violations }},
  "message": "EDA log indexed successfully via Hybrid Parser"
}

parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eda_logs (
    log_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    tool_name TEXT,
    verilog_files TEXT[],
    total_lines INTEGER,
    error_count INTEGER,
    warning_count INTEGER,
    timing_violations INTEGER,
    chunk_count INTEGER,
    status TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
